message:
test(workflows): add 17 unit tests for PaneWorkflowLockManager

Comprehensive coverage for the pane workflow lock manager:
- LockAcquisitionResult predicates (is_acquired, is_already_locked)
- try_acquire / release basic lifecycle
- Release with wrong execution_id (fails safely)
- Release nonexistent lock
- Independent locking of different panes
- is_locked returns PaneLockInfo with correct fields
- active_locks (empty, populated, after partial release)
- RAII acquire_guard: lock-on-create, unlock-on-drop, explicit release
- acquire_guard returns None when already locked
- force_release: removes lock, returns info, allows reacquire
- PaneLockInfo serde roundtrip
- Default trait creates empty manager
- Stress test: acquire/release 100 panes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
